name: 克兹·安德森
introduction: Kez Anderson is an actress (and keen equestrian) living in London, England. Known for roles in TV Brave New World (2020) Foundation (2020) film The Roads Not Taken (2020) Star Wars: Rise of Skywalker (2019) and web series The Revengelists (2019) and Bleachers (2019).Born in Reading, Berkshire to Barbadian parents, she began her acting/drama education with The University of Reading where she worked with now award winning director and playwright Duncan McMillan. Progressing and developing her acting training with acting coach Ivana Chubbuck, Anthony Meindl Actor Workshops, Identity Drama School and Independent Drama (stage combat). Also enjoying working out and exploring martial arts with Wing Tsung London.Kez is a warm, funny creative force and a generous collaborator with unwavering focus and energy. Her background in business, beauty and massage therapy, fashion styling, marketing, and TV/film production all contribute to her professionalism and phenomenal work ethic.
